spots.title: Amsterdam · 阿姆斯特丹 🇳🇱
spots.text: (2026.2) Helped by kind customs officers — the spot where our Europe trip touched down. 得到了善良的海关人员的帮助，这是我们欧洲之旅落地的地方。

spots.title: Paris · 巴黎 🇫🇷 🗼
spots.text: (2026.2) A moveable feast — a rainbow over the Seine 🌈. 流动的盛宴，塞纳河的彩虹🌈。

spots.title: Milan · 米兰 🇮🇹
spots.text: (2026.2) A city ringed by snowy peaks — we arrived during the Winter Olympics. 雪山环绕的城市，我们在冬奥会期间来到了这里。

spots.title: Bolzano · 博尔扎诺 🇮🇹
spots.text: (2026.2) A ski town wrapped in church bells; the square gathered to watch the Winter Olympics together — and don't miss the blade-like ridges of the Dolomites. 滑雪小镇，教堂的钟声萦绕。广场上大家一起看冬奥会。当然还有 Dolomites 的刀锋山，别忘了去。

spots.title: Barcelona · 巴塞罗那 🇪🇸
spots.text: (2026.2) Gaudí's dream is José's dream; light in the Sagrada Família falls on a Bible carved in stone. 高迪的梦想就是何塞的梦想。圣家堂的光，照耀在石刻的圣经上。

spots.title: Nice · 尼斯 🇫🇷
spots.text: (2026.2) Carnival crowds, embracing up on Castle Hill. 狂欢节人群，在城堡山上相拥。

spots.title: Menton · 芒通 🇫🇷
spots.text: (2026.2) The winter lemon town is still warm; time slips away forever. 冬季柠檬小镇依然温暖，时间永逝。

spots.title: Rome · 罗马 🇮🇹
spots.text: (2026.2) After a torrential downpour, the sunset glow over St. Peter's Basilica. 磅礴的大雨，迎来的是圣彼得大教堂的晚霞。

spots.title: Athens · 雅典 🇬🇷
spots.text: (2026.2) Easygoing cats wandering through the ruins of Athens. 闲适的猫儿，游走在雅典遗址里。

spots.title: Mount Bromo · 布罗莫火山 🇮🇩
spots.text: (2024.3) Worth coming to see with your own eyes! 亲自来看看会很好！

spots.title: Nusa Penida · 佩尼达岛 🇮🇩
spots.text: (2024.3) Fell off a motorbike and it left a scar on my arm — but hey, that's a souvenir! 骑摩托车摔了，给我的手臂留下了疤痕。不过这个是 souvenir！

spots.title: Lovina · 罗维纳 🇮🇩
spots.text: (2024.3) Remember to wake up early to chase the dolphins 🐬. 记得早起来追海豚🐬。

spots.title: Bali 巴厘岛🇮🇩
spots.text: (2024.3) A fun seaside bar. 有趣的海边酒吧。

spots.title: Singapore · 新加坡 🇸🇬
spots.text: (2024.3) The Merlion glitters beneath Marina Bay Sands; low on budget, we ended up sleeping at the airport. 鱼尾狮在金沙酒店下闪耀。我们经费不足就去睡了机场。

spots.title: Haikou, Hainan · 海南海口 🇨🇳
spots.text: (2020.9–2024.6) Gorgeous sunsets, qingbuliang (a chilled sweet soup) and zaopo vinegar. 绚烂的晚霞，清补凉，糟粕醋。

spots.title: Shenzhen, Guangdong · 广东深圳 🇨🇳
spots.text: (2023.12–2024.3) Among interesting entrepreneurs. 有趣的创业者们。

spots.title: Nanjing, Jiangsu · 江苏南京 🇨🇳
spots.text: (2024.9–2027.6) Mooring at night by the Qinhuai, near the wine-shops; cycling on Purple Mountain. I know so many lovely corners here — a tiny French bistro by Pearl River, Ming-dynasty stone carvings at Xuanwu Lake, and a cow-cat under the old city wall. 夜泊秦淮近酒家，紫金山的骑行。我知道这个城市很多有趣的地方：珍珠河的小法餐店，玄武湖的明代石刻，城墙下的奶牛猫。

spots.title: Shanghai · 中国上海 🇨🇳
spots.text: (2025.10–Now) Jazz city and coffee city. Maybe only I know the little cat on West Nanjing Road. Shanghai never shanghaied you. Decades of stubbornly never snowing. 爵士之城，咖啡之城。南京西路的小猫或许只有我知道。Shanghai never shanghaied you。几十年不下雪的认真。
